name: Rosemary (Herb / EO)
description: A Mediterranean herb with rosmarinic acid, ursolic acid, and carnosic acid providing anti-inflammatory, vasodilatory, and hair-follicle-stimulating effects.
chemicalName: Complex mixture; key compounds: rosmarinic acid, carnosic acid, ursolic acid, 1,8-cineole
formula: Rosmarinic acid: C₁₈H₁₆O₈; Ursolic acid: C₃₀H₄₈O₃
appearance: Essential oil: colorless to pale yellow liquid. Dried herb: grey-green needle-like leaves.
solubility: Essential oil insoluble in water, soluble in ethanol and fixed oils; rosmarinic acid soluble in water
chemistry: Rosmarinic acid (anti-inflammatory), ursolic acid (vasodilator + DHT inhibitor), carnosic acid (hair follicle stimulant). 2015 RCT: comparable to 2% minoxidil. Three independent mechanisms.
warnings: EO: always dilute. Avoid pregnancy at high doses.
shelfLife: Dried herb: 1–3 years. Essential oil: 2–3 years.
